Benvenuto in TeraBox. Per utilizzare TeraBox è necessaria una connessione dati cellulare o Wi-Fi. Contatta il tuo operatore telefonico per conoscere i costi della connessione dati. La tua privacy è importante per noi e ci impegniamo a proteggere le tue informazioni personali. Prima di utilizzare l\'app TeraBox, ti preghiamo di leggere e confermare di accettare la nostra Informativa sulla privacy, i Termini di servizio e l\'Informativa sulla lettura degli appunti.
Continuando a utilizzare il sito, accetti i nostri termini e condizioni.

Ricevi la ricompensa dopo aver guardato l\'ultimo video
1. Riceverai una ricompensa dopo aver guardato un video e potrai accumulare fino a 7 ricompense al giorno.

2. I premi Premium entrano in vigore immediatamente dopo il ritiro, ad eccezione del privilegio di 2 TB di spazio. Puoi ottenere 1 TB di spazio aggiuntivo partecipando alle campagne presso il Centro Assistenza.
3. Qui puoi ottenere fino a 1.000 giorni di Premium.
4. Qui puoi ottenere fino a 1.000 giorni di abbonamento Premium.
Ricevi un sacchetto regalo Oro dopo aver raccolto tutti i vantaggi giornalieri
1. Puoi ricevere una ricompensa per ogni video che guardi. Gli obiettivi di ricompensa vengono azzerati giornalmente.
2. Il premio Premium ha effetto immediatamente dopo il suo ritiro e non include il privilegio di 2 TB di spazio di archiviazione.
3. Qui puoi guadagnare fino a 1.500 giorni di Premium. Puoi abbonarti a TeraBox Premium per un totale di 5 anni (inclusi quelli acquistati o accumulati gratuitamente).
4. A breve sarà disponibile la funzione di prelievo dell\'oro in contanti, che consentirà di riscattare l\'oro in contanti (in base alla disponibilità effettiva) presso il Gold Center.
Guarda 7 video al giorno per ottenere 4 giorni di Premium gratuito e ulteriori ricompense Gold.

1. Each invitation is valid for 7 days: within this period, the high-definition benefit duration will be extended by inviting friends, until the total benefit duration reaches 7 days, after which it will no longer increase. You can continue inviting friends if the benefit duration is less than 7 days. 2. The sharing channels that can extend high-definition benefits are listed below. Other channels are not yet supported and cannot extend benefits: Copy link/WhatsApp/TeraBox Friends/Telegram/Instagram/Facebook/X/Discord. 3. Other restrictions and instructions: * If an invitee repeatedly accesses TeraBox via the same high-definition benefit link, your benefit is extended by only 1 day in total. * The same invitee can be invited only once per calendar day. Even if invited by other users, neither party will receive additional benefits. * High-definition benefits are for non-members only. Members receive 100 GB of space (valid for 30 days). * Only inviters and invitees with TeraBox v4.13 or above can participate in this free high-definition benefit event.

"1. Each invitation is valid for 7*24 hours. Inviting friends within this period accumulates HD benefit time until the total reaches the validity period, after which it stops. You can continue inviting if the validity period hasn't been reached.
2. Sharing channels that can increase HD benefits are listed below. Other channels do not support this feature: Copy link/WhatsApp/Telegram/Instagram/Facebook/X/Twitter/Discord.
3. Other restrictions and notes: * If an invitee repeatedly accesses TeraBox via the same HD benefit link, your benefit increases by only 24 hours. * The same invitee can only be invited once every 24 hours. Further invitations from any user yield no additional benefits for either party. * HD benefits are for non-members only. Members receive 100GB of space (valid for 30 days). * Both inviter and invitee must have TeraBox v4.13 or above to participate in this HD benefit event. "

PremiumPurchase: Once the purchase is confirmed, your Google account will be charged immediately. The specific price shown on this page is the final price. The pPremiumervice will be activated immediately after successful payment, and the duration of the prPremiumrvice will depend on the plan you purchased. In addition to the regular TeraBox services, you can enjoy all the prePremiumvileges, while also having access to the regular TeraBox services without a premPremiumcription.

Auto-renewal Billing Cycle: The specific billing cycle depends on the premiPremiumyou purchased. The first two plans displayed at the top of this page are a monthly package and an annual package. The auto-renewal subscription fee will be deducted from your account within 24 hours before the end of each billing cycle.

Subscription Cancellation and Refund: To cancel the auto-renewal subscription, please go to the account settings in Google Play. You should cancel the subscription at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing cycle to avoid being charged for the next cycle. You cannot get a refund for the current billing cycle if you cancel the subscription, but you can continue to use the services for the remainder of the current billing cycle. Your cancellation will take effect from the next billing cycle.

I like the automatic backup feature of TeraBox, which ensures my files are always up-to-date. Especially as a Premium, I can use original quality for video backups, ensuring the quality of my videos.
TeraBox is very convenient. I can access my files using my mobile phone or computer anytime and anywhere.
The customer service of TeraBox is excellent. As a Premium, I can get a response within a day after submitting feedback, quickly resolving any app-related queries.
As a Premium, my download speed is very fast, which saves me a lot of time and improves my efficiency.

The ability to download 5 files simultaneously in the app is a great feature. I often receive shares from others and download them locally. Downloading multiple files simultaneously saves me a lot of time.
As a Premium, I often edit and crop my images on the app, which is very convenient. After modifying, I can save them directly.
As a Premium, an ad-free experience is important. The ad-free TeraBox is clean and easy to use, making it easy to learn various functions.
The price of TeraBox is extremely competitive. I used to be an OneDrive user, but TeraBox offers a much better value. It is a very cost-effective app.
"I love the recycle bin's file recovery feature. I accidentally deleted some files previously, but fortunately, as a Premium, I have a 30-day retrieval period, preventing file loss."
I really like the Safe Vault because I have some private files that I don’t want others to see. As a Premium, being able to protect my privacy is very important.
TeraBox is highly secure. I can confidently store up to 2TB of important files.
"TeraBox's sharing feature is convenient. I can create a link to spread the files I want to share with many people at the same time."
The most surprising thing is having 2048GB of storage space as a Premium, enough for all my files and photos. Google Drive only offers 5GB for free. Thus, I am a loyal fan and user of TeraBox
I have saved a lot of videos in TeraBox. As a Premium, the speed-watch feature is a pleasant surprise, allowing me to finish a video more efficiently and quickly.
As a student, I have a lot of study materials to store. Being a TeraBox Premium, I can store 50,000 files, which is very important to me. It allows me to have enough materials for my studies.
